scores.name: hardship_handling
scores.reason: Agent 1 identified the borrower's hardship (unemployment) and appropriately closed the assessment to pass the case for hardship review. However, the initial verification request was not fully supported due to the borrower's refusal to confirm identity.

scores.name: policy_safe_resolution
scores.reason: Agent 2 correctly acknowledged the borrower's hardship and stated that no payment commitment was required at this time. The agent also adhered to policy by not presenting unauthorized offers and recognizing the stop-contact flag.

scores.name: required_disclosures_and_identity
scores.reason: Agent 1 disclosed its identity and that the conversation was being logged. However, the verification process was incomplete due to the borrower's refusal to confirm identity.

scores.name: stop_contact_and_non_harassment
scores.reason: Agent 3 acknowledged the borrower's request to stop contact and confirmed that no further outreach would occur unless necessary, complying with the stop-contact flag.

scores.name: handoff_execution
scores.reason: While Agent 1 effectively transitioned to Agent 2 without unnecessary repetition, Agent 2 did not present any options due to the borrower's stated inability to pay, which could have been better articulated to maintain continuity.
